en.extract:
The rufous-winged sunbird (Cinnyris rufipennis) is a species of bird in the family Nectariniidae. It is endemic to Tanzania.
Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. It is threatened by habitat loss.

BirdLife Species Factsheet.

The '''rufous-winged sunbird''' ('''''Cinnyris rufipennis''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Nectariniidae]]. It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to [[Tanzania]].

Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]]s. It is threatened by [[habitat loss]].
